001package com.stuypulse.robot.util.simulation;
002
003import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
004
005import edu.wpi.first.util.struct.Struct;
006
007import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
008
009public class OffsetsStruct implements Struct<Offsets> {
010    @Override
011    public Class<Offsets> getTypeClass() {
012        return Offsets.class;
013    }
014
015    @Override
016    public String getTypeName() {
017        return "Offsets";
018    }
019
020    @Override
021    public int getSize() {
022        return kSizeDouble * 6;
023    }
024
025    @Override
026    public String getSchema() {
027        return "double x;double y;double z;double roll;double pitch;double yaw";
028    }
029
030    @Override
031    public Offsets unpack(ByteBuffer bb) {
032        return new Offsets(Meters.of(bb.getDouble()), Meters.of(bb.getDouble()), Meters.of(bb.getDouble()), 
033            Radians.of(bb.getDouble()), Radians.of(bb.getDouble()), Radians.of(bb.getDouble()));
034    }
035
036    @Override
037    public void pack(ByteBuffer bb, Offsets value) {
038        bb.putDouble(value.x().in(Meters));
039        bb.putDouble(value.y().in(Meters));
040        bb.putDouble(value.z().in(Meters));
041        bb.putDouble(value.roll().in(Radians));
042        bb.putDouble(value.pitch().in(Radians));
043        bb.putDouble(value.yaw().in(Radians));
044    }
045}
